user.title: Configure journal storage
user.description: Choose privacy and geofence timing defaults. Coordinates are not stored unless enabled.

error.invalid_value: Enter a valid value. Timing and margin values cannot be negative, and GPS accuracy must be greater than zero.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one Geofence Journal configuration is supported.

upsert_tracker.name: Create or update tracker
upsert_tracker.description: Creates or updates a supported Home Assistant tracker and returns its stable resource ID.

resource_id.name: Resource ID
resource_id.description: Existing tracker UUID to update. Leave empty to create a tracker with a generated UUID.

entity_id.name: Tracker entity
entity_id.description: Person or device tracker entity that supplies location observations.

kind.name: Tracker kind
kind.description: Tracker kind, which must match the selected entity domain.

name.name: Name
name.description: Human-readable tracker name used in journal events.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this tracker can participate in active recording rules.

upsert_place.name: Create or update place
upsert_place.description: Creates or updates a fixed-coordinate or Home Assistant zone place and returns its stable resource ID.

resource_id.name: Resource ID
resource_id.description: Existing place UUID to update. Leave empty to create a place with a generated UUID.

name.name: Name
name.description: Human-readable place name used in journal events.

source_type.name: Place source
source_type.description: Whether geometry comes from fixed coordinates or a live Home Assistant zone.

zone_entity_id.name: Zone entity
zone_entity_id.description: Required for a Home Assistant zone place; leave empty for fixed coordinates.

latitude.name: Latitude
latitude.description: Required latitude from -90 to 90 degrees for a fixed-coordinate place.

longitude.name: Longitude
longitude.description: Required longitude from -180 to 180 degrees for a fixed-coordinate place.

radius_meters.name: Radius
radius_meters.description: Required positive radius in meters for a fixed-coordinate place.

exit_margin_meters.name: Exit margin
exit_margin_meters.description: Non-negative hysteresis margin outside the place radius, in meters.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this place can participate in active recording rules.

upsert_journal.name: Create or update journal
upsert_journal.description: Creates or updates a named event journal and returns its stable resource ID.

resource_id.name: Resource ID
resource_id.description: Existing journal UUID to update. Leave empty to create a journal with a generated UUID.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether this journal accepts events from active recording rules.

upsert_rule.name: Create or update recording rule
upsert_rule.description: Links a tracker, place, and journal with confirmation, cooldown, and accuracy thresholds.

resource_id.name: Resource ID
resource_id.description: Existing rule UUID to update. Leave empty to create a rule with a generated UUID.

tracker_id.name: Tracker ID
tracker_id.description: Stable UUID returned by the tracker action.

place_id.name: Place ID
place_id.description: Stable UUID returned by the place action.

journal_id.name: Journal ID
journal_id.description: Stable UUID returned by the journal action.

enter_confirmation_seconds.name: Enter confirmation
enter_confirmation_seconds.description: Non-negative seconds an enter candidate must remain valid.

exit_confirmation_seconds.name: Exit confirmation
exit_confirmation_seconds.description: Non-negative seconds an exit candidate must remain valid.

cooldown_seconds.name: Cooldown
cooldown_seconds.description: Non-negative seconds that suppress repeated same-direction events.

max_gps_accuracy_meters.name: Maximum GPS inaccuracy
max_gps_accuracy_meters.description: Positive maximum accepted GPS inaccuracy in meters.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Whether the rule actively evaluates tracker observations.

add_event.name: Add manual event
add_event.description: Creates a manual event. The event ID and confirmation time are generated by Geofence Journal.

journal_id.name: Journal ID
journal_id.description: Stable UUID of the journal that receives the event.

tracker_id.name: Tracker ID
tracker_id.description: Stable UUID of the tracker associated with the event.

place_id.name: Place ID
place_id.description: Stable UUID of the place associated with the event.

occurred_at.name: Occurred at
occurred_at.description: Timezone-aware date and time when the manual event occurred.

latitude.name: Latitude
latitude.description: Optional latitude from -90 to 90 degrees; provide it together with longitude.

longitude.name: Longitude
longitude.description: Optional longitude from -180 to 180 degrees; provide it together with latitude.

accuracy_m.name: GPS accuracy
accuracy_m.description: Optional non-negative GPS inaccuracy in meters for supplied coordinates.

note.name: Note
note.description: Optional note retained with the manual event.

exclude_event.name: Exclude event
exclude_event.description: Marks an event excluded while retaining the event and an audit revision.

event_id.name: Event ID
event_id.description: Stable UUID of the event to exclude.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Optional reason recorded in the audit revision.

restore_event.name: Restore event
restore_event.description: Restores an excluded event to confirmed status while retaining an audit revision.

event_id.name: Event ID
event_id.description: Stable UUID of the event to restore.

reason.name: Reason
reason.description: Optional reason recorded in the audit revision.

export_journal.name: Export journal
export_journal.description: Creates a UTF-8 BOM CSV behind an authenticated download URL that expires after 24 hours.

journal_id.name: Journal ID
journal_id.description: Stable UUID of the journal to export.

start_at.name: Start time
start_at.description: Optional inclusive timezone-aware start of the export interval.

end_at.name: End time
end_at.description: Optional inclusive timezone-aware end of the export interval.

include_coordinates.name: Include coordinates
include_coordinates.description: Include coordinate columns when coordinates were stored; disabled by default.

purge_events.name: Purge events
purge_events.description: Counts or permanently removes events strictly before a date and time.

before.name: Before
before.description: Timezone-aware cutoff; only events strictly earlier than this value are selected.

journal_id.name: Journal ID
journal_id.description: Stable UUID of the journal whose matching events are selected.

dry_run.name: Dry run
dry_run.description: Report matching event and revision counts without deleting data.

confirm.name: Confirm permanent deletion
confirm.description: Must be enabled for a non-dry-run purge to delete matching data.

compact_database.name: Compact database
compact_database.description: Checkpoints the SQLite WAL and runs VACUUM to compact the database.

reset_database.name: Reset database
reset_database.description: Permanently clears all Geofence Journal domain and runtime data and restores schema version 1.

confirmation.name: Confirmation phrase
confirmation.description: Enter exactly DELETE ALL GEOFENCE JOURNAL DATA to authorize the reset.
